rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.127 governs campaign finance termination reports. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 254.127. TERMINATION REPORT. (a) If the campaign treasurer appointment of a specific-purpose committee is terminated, the terminated campaign treasurer shall file a termination report.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
